hero.title: Upcoming Events
hero.subtitle: Join us for workshops, open days, and learning experiences for children and youth.

noEvents: No upcoming events at the moment. Check back soon or subscribe to our newsletter.

events.title: Little Farmers Holiday Camp
events.description: A full week of hands-on farming, nature exploration, and cooking for children aged 6–10. Limited spots available.

events.title: AI Explorers Open Day
events.description: An introductory session for children aged 10–14 and their parents. Meet our facilitators, try a mini coding challenge, and learn how to enrol.

events.title: Young Entrepreneurs Pitch Day
events.description: Watch our Young Entrepreneurs cohort pitch their business ideas to a panel of judges and industry mentors. Open to the public — come and cheer them on!
